create-module.description: Scaffold a new engineering module under modules/
create-module.template: Create a new module in modules/$1 following the template at templates/module-template/. Include README.md, theory.md, an example/, tests/, and a decision record. Use Java 25 features.

adr.description: Create a new Architecture Decision Record
adr.template: Create a new ADR in docs/adr/ following the format of existing ADRs (0001-0004). Number it sequentially.

issue.description: Create a GitHub issue using the appropriate template
issue.template: Create a GitHub issue for the project. Use one of the templates in .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ (research.yml, feature.yml, benchmark.yml, documentation.yml, bug.yml, engineering-question.yml) depending on the type.
